changes: Rewrote skill from Chinese to English for better model comprehension
Replaced verbose bash/find/grep examples with complete Python scripts
Added explicit instructions to write .py files and run them, not use python3 -c
Removed all regex patterns - qwen3-30b cannot serialize regex with special characters into JSON tool arguments
Replaced regex-based kebab-case conversion with character-by-character string processing (isalnum check)
Added critical rules section emphasizing script-based approach and output file placement
